exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your relationship therapy forward
items: Research and create a list of 3-5 potential couples therapists in your area
Schedule initial consultations with your top 2-3 therapist choices
Create a written list of your relationship strengths and 2-3 specific areas you want to improve
Establish weekly check-in meetings with your partner to discuss therapy progress and practice new communication techniques
Complete individual reflection worksheets before your first joint therapy session
Create a relationship timeline documenting major milestones, challenges, and turning points together
